basic_details.job_title: CNCI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CNCI is recruiting 01 Project Assistant on contractual basis for 06 months (extendable).

application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online in the specified bank account.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 Years (as on 01.01.2026) | desirable: Field experience, scientific proposal writing, knowledge of statistical tools, computers, health research, data collection
qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology with 03 years experience OR Master’s Degree in relevant subject

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility followed by verification of original documents. Selection will be based on merit and performance.
how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed application form (available in notification).
Send the duly filled application with supporting documents by Speed Post or email to [email protected] on or before 30.07.2026.
Address: The Director, Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute, Street No-299, DJ Block, Action Area-1D, Newtown, Kolkata-700160.
important_instructions: Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. Mere submission of application does not guarantee selection. CNCI reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. Legal jurisdiction: Kolkata.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (an Autonomous Institute under Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Govt. of India) has invited applications for the post of Project Assistant under the PBCR Project, Kolkata. The notification includes details on qualification, experience, age limit, remuneration, and application process. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download CNCI Kolkata Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: CNCI is recruiting 01 Project Assistant on contractual basis for 06 months (extendable).

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.details: Graduate in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology with 03 years experience OR Master’s Degree in relevant subject
Field experience, scientific proposal writing, knowledge of statistical tools, computers, health research, data collection

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee to be paid online in the specified bank account.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on eligibility followed by verification of original documents. Selection will be based on merit and performance.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CNCI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the prescribed application form (available in notification). Pay the application fee online. Send the duly filled application with supporting documents by Speed Post or email to [email protected] on or before 30.07.2026 . Address: The Director, Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute, Street No-299, DJ Block, Action Area-1D, Newtown, Kolkata-700160.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. Mere submission of application does not guarantee selection. CNCI reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. Legal jurisdiction: Kolkata.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in CNCI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
Q2. What is the last date to apply for CNCI Kolkata Project Assistant?
Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant in CNCI?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for CNCI Project Assistant post?
Q5. What is the essential qualification for CNCI Project Assistant?
faq.answer: Graduate with 3 years experience OR Master’s Degree in Sociology/Anthropology/Social Sciences/Medical Social Work/Psychology.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UR candidates in CNCI Recruitment?
Q7. How to apply for CNCI Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Send filled application form with documents by Speed Post or email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. Is the CNCI Project Assistant post permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is on contractual basis for 6 months (extendable).

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for CNCI application?
faq.answer: Educational certificates, experience letters, age proof, category certificate (if applicable), and fee receipt.
